title: TurboBlaze 6.0-Quart Air Fryer - Dark Gray - COSORI
evidence_snippet: Cosori product page states: up to 46% faster cooking compared to COSORI CP168 / Pro Gen 2; PFAS-free ceramic coating; 9 cooking functions; product highlights include 6-quart capacity, dishwasher-safe basket and crisper plate; summary includes up to 95% less oil than traditional deep frying.
intended_use: wellness bridge around less-oil home cooking and easier cleanup

title: Cosori Air Fryer Collection for Easy Nutritious Meals - COSORI
evidence_snippet: Cosori collection page title frames the air fryer collection around easy nutritious meals; use as brand/category framing only, not as a quantified health outcome claim.
